entries.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entries.description: Adapted Andrej-Karpathy-style coding guidelines (personal fork)

entries.title: medical-mcps
entries.description: Comprehensive biological and medical research data integration server providing unified access to 13+ specialized databases including Reactome (pathways), KEGG (pathways/diseases), UniProt (proteins), ChEMBL (drug discovery), PubMed (literature), GWAS Catalog (genetic associations), ClinicalTrials.gov (clinical trials), OpenFDA (drug safety), Pathway Commons (pathway data), Gene Ontology (gene functions), OMIM (genetic disorders), NCI Thesaurus (cancer terminology), OpenTargets (disease-target associations), and CTG (gene-disease). Offers 100+ tools through both a unified endpoint (all databases via single connection) and individual API endpoints. Features RFC 9111 compliant HTTP caching with 30-day TTL for optimal performance.

entries.title: agentmail
entries.description: AI-native email infrastructure for coding agents. Create inboxes, send and receive emails, manage threads, and automate email workflows.

entries.description: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 64 agents, 261 skills, 84 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entries.title: humanizer-es
entries.description: Edita textos en español para que suenen naturales y humanos, no generados por IA. Adaptación nativa al español del Humanizer: detecta muletillas de IA, calcos del inglés, nominalización, simetría forzada, tono corporativo, raya al estilo inglés y mayúsculas de título a la inglesa. Maneja variantes (España, Latinoamérica, neutro).

entries.title: nature-skills
entries.description: A growing collection of Claude-compatible academic workflow bundles for producing work at Nature-journal standard. Covers scientific figures (nature-figure), manuscript prose polishing (nature-polishing), manuscript drafting and methods writing (nature-writing), reviewer-style pre-submission assessment (nature-reviewer), citation retrieval and export (nature-citation), data availability statements and FAIR metadata (nature-data), paper-to-PPTX presentation conversion (nature-paper2ppt), literature search via MCP (nature-academic-search), paper reading and annotation (nature-reader), and peer-review response drafting (nature-response). Future releases planned: statistical reporting, cover letters, and review articles. Rules are derived from primary sources, including published Nature papers, journal author guidelines, and structured writing curricula.

entries.title: dm
entries.description: Dungeon Master assistant for running persistent D&D 5e campaigns. Campaign creation/loading, character management, combat tracking, NPC generation, dice rolling, an optional live display companion, and full session state — all persisted across sessions. Provides the `dnd` skill; invoke as /dm:dnd, or just describe what you want once a campaign is loaded.

entries.title: ai-sdlc-harness
entries.description: AI-driven SDLC workflow harness for multi-repo development. Provides story refinement, multi-agent development (plan → code → review → test → PR), and automated guardrails via hooks. Supports Azure DevOps, Jira, GitLab, GitHub, Zoho, and local Markdown as work item providers; ADO, GitLab, GitHub, gh-cli, and glab-cli as git providers. Language-agnostic, discovery-driven; supports any language (frontend + backend).

entries.title: appdirect
entries.description: Agent skills for AppDirect marketplace work — app submission runbook (100% profile-completion) and platform API integration (OAuth, GraphQL mutations, event endpoints, SSO).

entries.title: fleet
entries.description: Claude Code supervises a multi-provider fleet of AI coding workers (OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini CLI, Claude Code headless, and 75+ providers via OpenCode including DeepSeek, Qwen, and local LM Studio/Ollama models) as background subagents: registry-driven routing by capability, cost, and observed track record; parallel dispatch; per-provider rate-limit cooldowns with cascade fallback; verification-gated acceptance; and an outcome ledger that makes routing smarter with use. NOTE: runs unattended agents (file edits + command execution, no approval prompts) inside your repo — read the README warning before installing; use only in repos you trust. The skill itself follows the Agent Skills open standard and also runs under Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and other compatible supervisors (see install.sh).

entries.title: terraform-patterns
entries.description: Terraform infrastructure-as-code agent skill and plugin for module design patterns, state management strategies, provider configuration, security hardening, and CI/CD plan/apply workflows. Covers mono-repo vs multi-repo, workspaces, policy-as-code, and drift detection.

entries.title: engineering-skills

Agent skill and plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, OpenClaw.

entries.title: self-improving-agent
entries.description: Curate auto-memory, promote learnings to CLAUDE.md and rules, extract proven patterns into reusable skills.

entries.title: docker-development
entries.description: Docker and container development agent skill and plugin for Dockerfile optimization, docker-compose orchestration, multi-stage builds, and container security hardening. Covers build performance, layer caching, and production-ready container patterns.

entries.description: Adversarial thinking partner for founders and executives. Stress-tests plans, prepares for board meetings, navigates hard decisions, and forces honest post-mortems.

entries.title: skill-security-auditor
entries.description: Security audit and vulnerability scanner for AI agent skills. Scans for malicious patterns, prompt injection, data exfiltration, and unsafe file operations.

entries.title: agenthub
entries.description: Multi-agent collaboration plugin for Claude Code. Spawn N parallel subagents that compete on code optimization, content drafts, research approaches, or any problem that benefits from diverse solutions. Evaluate by metric or LLM judge, merge the winner. 7 slash commands, agent templates, git DAG orchestration, message board coordination.

entries.title: dignified-python
entries.description: Production-tested Python coding standards with version-aware type annotations, LBYL exception handling, and modern typing patterns. Includes guides for CLI patterns, subprocess handling, and Python 3.10-3.13 features.

entries.title: a11y-audit
entries.description: WCAG 2.2 accessibility audit and fix skill for React, Next.js, Vue, Angular, Svelte, and HTML. Static scanner detecting 20+ violation types, contrast checker with suggest mode, framework-specific fix patterns, CI-friendly exit codes.
